redemption_instructions_by_platform.0: How to redeem:  Visit the code redemption page on the official website of Honkai: Star Rail (https://hsr.hoyoverse.com/gift).  Log in to your game account and follow the instructions to input the code.  Once redeemed, you will receive the Bundle through the in-game mail system.   Redemption Code Content: Stellar Jade ×30*, Credit ×20,000, Lost Gold Fragment ×4, Condensed Aether ×5, Traveler's Guide ×3.   *Rewards are limited to 900,000 redemption codes. The redemption code will expire on 2026/05/20 11:00:00 (UTC+8).

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
To redeem your THE FINALS Season 10 Quest gift code, visit Embark's code redemption website and log in to your account: https://id.embark.games/id/the-finals/giveaway  
Paste your gift code to obtain your Skill Issue 3.0 set.  
Requires THE FINALS; redeem by December 31, 2026.
